_comment_about: Reference snippet for claude_desktop_config.json. MIT-0-licensed (no attribution required); the InvestorClaw service it connects to is Apache 2.0.
_comment_merging: If your config file does not exist, save this whole document as claude_desktop_config.json after deleting the _comment_* keys. If it already exists, merge ONLY the two entries inside mcpServers (investorclaw and mnemos) into your existing mcpServers object.
_comment_quit: After saving, FULLY QUIT Claude Desktop (Cmd+Q on macOS, Quit from system tray on Windows, pkill -f Claude on Linux) and relaunch. Closing the window is NOT enough.
_comment_prereq: These URLs assume the InvestorClaw containers are running locally (docker compose up -d in ~/.investorclaw). See INSTALL.md.
